# Phase 1-11 Build Books

## Purpose

Migrate all phase build books.

## Scope

- Phase 0-11 build books
- Cross-references
- Dependencies

## Implementation

2. Resolve references
3. Link objects

## Acceptance Criteria

2. References resolved
3. Linked correctly
